# <Center> **About**

I modeled and textured all types of furnaces, on and off and packed it all toghether! You can see off version bellow. For more check gallery or just install and check for yourself!

.<Center>
![Furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc3dd5b653c925134aa51ee5030c9c59a2ecb914.png)![BlastFurnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfb6c8280484535c15aabdbe402d1f022c64ece9.png)![Smoker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/495d6b6a0ab88c7e690bc61e9d7a926ee66818d0.png)


# **FAQ**
> **How to install resourcepacks?**
There are a lot of tutorial out there on youtube, that will explain this better than me, but just download something from trusted sites like modrinth or curseforge, then drag this file to folder that will pop out if you click "Open Pack Folder" in Minecraft.      

> **Can i use some resources from it in my pack?**
After installing it, open the file you downloaded (.zip). Here you will find licence. Read it.

> **Are any mods required?**
No. All vanilla friendly.
